heading: Special agricultural safeguard authority
label: 3602 Special agricultural safeguard authority
notes: Amendments2020—Subsec. (e). amended subsec. (e) generally. children.text: the list of special safeguard agricultural goods not later than the date of entry into force of the WTO Agreement with respect to the United States; and

children.label: A
children.text: the trigger level specified in subparagraph 1(a) of Article 5, on an annual basis;

children.label: B
children.text: the trigger price specified in subparagraph 1(b) of Article 5; and
the price-based safeguard in accordance with subparagraph 1(b) of Article 5; or
the volume-based safeguard in accordance with subparagraph 1(a) of Article 5,

children.heading: Imposition of safeguard
children.label: c Imposition of safeguard
children.text: The President shall direct the Secretary of the Treasury to impose a duty on a special safeguard agricultural good entered, or withdrawn from warehouse, for consumption in the United States in accordance with a determination made under subsection (b).

children.heading: No simultaneous safeguard
children.label: d No simultaneous safeguard
children.text: A duty may not be in effect for a special safeguard agricultural good pursuant to this section during any period in which such good is the subject of any action proclaimed pursuant to section 2252 or 2253 of this title.

children.heading: Exclusion of originating goods of USMCA countries
children.label: e Exclusion of originating goods of USMCA countries

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The President shall exempt from any duty imposed under this section any good that qualifies as an originating good under of a USMCA country with respect to which preferential tariff treatment is provided under the USMCA.section 4531 of this title

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: 2 Definitions
children.text: In this subsection, the terms “preferential tariff treatment”, “USMCA”, and “USMCA country” have the meanings given those terms in .section 4502 of this title

children.heading: Advice of Secretary of Agriculture
children.label: f Advice of Secretary of Agriculture
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall advise the President on the implementation of this section.

children.heading: Termination date
children.label: g Termination date
children.text: This section shall cease to be effective on the date, as determined by the President, that the special safeguard provisions of Article 5 are no longer in force with respect to the United States.
the term “Article 5” means Article 5 of the Agreement on Agriculture described in ;section 3511(d)(2) of this title
the term “relevant period” means the period determined by the President to be applicable to a special safeguard agricultural good for purposes of applying this section; and
the term “special safeguard agricultural good” means an agricultural good on which an additional duty may be imposed pursuant to the special safeguard provisions of Article 5.
